name: Spinach Cheddar Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 10-oz. pkg. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
cooking spray -- to coat baking dish
recipeInstructions:
PREHEAT OVEN TO 350°F.
In a medium bowl, combine egg substitute, milk, onion flakes, parmesan cheese, garlic powder, and pepper; set aside. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly onto the bottom of a prepared 8x8x2-inch baking dish. Top with 1/2 cup cheddar cheese and spinach, spread evenly over bread crumbs. Pour egg mixture evenly over spinach; top with remaining cheddar cheese.
Bake for 35 - 40 minutes or until set. Let stand 10 minutes. Cut into bite-size squares for appetizers or 9 squares for side dish; serve hot.
